server/tests/test_histogram.py :: test_luminance_histogram_counts_pixels
def test_luminance_histogram_counts_pixels() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(4, 4, 128, 128, 128)
    histogram = luminance_histogram(raster, buckets=8)
    assert sum(histogram) == 16

server/tests/test_histogram.py :: test_histogram_entropy_zero_for_flat_image
def test_histogram_entropy_zero_for_flat_image() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(6, 6, 10, 10, 10)
    histogram = luminance_histogram(raster, buckets=16)
    assert histogram_entropy(histogram) == 0.0

server/tests/test_histogram.py :: test_cumulative_histogram_ends_at_total
def test_cumulative_histogram_ends_at_total() -> None:
    values = [1, 2, 3, 4]
    cumulative = cumulative_histogram(values)
    assert cumulative[-1] == sum(values)

server/tests/test_histogram.py :: test_contrast_estimate_for_gradient
def test_contrast_estimate_for_gradient() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(20, 16)
    contrast = contrast_estimate(raster)
    assert contrast["range"] > 100

server/tests/test_histogram.py :: test_saturation_histogram_nonempty
def test_saturation_histogram_nonempty() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(5, 5, 255, 0, 0)
    histogram = saturation_histogram(raster, buckets=8)
    assert sum(histogram) == 25

server/tests/test_histogram.py :: test_build_histogram_report_shape
def test_build_histogram_report_shape() -> None:
    report = build_histogram_report(gradient_raster(12, 10))
    assert "luminance" in report
    assert "rgb" in report
    assert "contrast" in report
    assert "saturation" in report
